subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I lower my wing and humble myself upon the dust of servitude before the glory of Thy Divinity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی انی اخفض جناحی و اتذلل علی تراب العبودیه لعزه الوهیتک و
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @prayer for the departed, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @love of God
